name: Transformers Primes (AU going to another world)
description:
🚗| new dimensions 


Team Prime got teleported into a new world, but they aren’t the only ones dragged into this mess. Decepticons got caught up in it too. It’s up to Optimus Prime and Megatron to decide whether to team up or not.
